segments.text: Make from acacia wood an altar for burning incense.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: It shall be square, measuring a cubit by a cubit, by two cubits high, with horns on its corners that are all one piece with the altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Cover its top, its side, and its horns with pure gold, and make a gold trim to go all around it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: On two of the altar's sides make two gold rings and attach them below the trim to hold the poles that carry it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Make the poles of acacia wood and cover them with gold.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Put the altar in front of the veil that hangs before the Ark of the Testimony and the atonement cover that is over the Testimony where I will meet with you.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Aaron is to burn fragrant incense on the altar every morning when he takes care of the lamps.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When he lights the lamps in the evening he must burn incense again so that incense will always be burned in the Lord's presence for generations to come.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't offer on this altar any unapproved incense or any burnt offering or grain offering, and do not pour out a drink offering upon it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Once a year Aaron must perform the atonement ritual by placing blood on the horns of the altar from the sin offering for atonement. This yearly atonement ritual must be carried out for generations to come. This is the Lord's holy altar.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
When you take a census of the Israelites, each man must pay the Lord to buy back his life when he's counted. Then they won't suffer from the plague when they're counted.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Each one who crosses over to those counted must give a half shekel (using the sanctuary shekel standard, which weighs twenty gerahs). This half shekel is an offering to the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: This offering to the Lord is required from everyone twenty years old and more.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: When you give this offering to buy back your lives the rich are not to give more than a half shekel and the poor are not to give less.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Take this money paid by the Israelites and use it for the expenses involved in the services of the Tent of Meeting. It will serve as a reminder for the Israelites to buy back your lives in the presence of the Lord.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
Make a bronze basin with a bronze st and for washing. Place it between the Tent of Meeting and the altar, and put water in it.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Aaron and his sons will use it to wash their hands and feet.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Whenever they enter the Tent of Meeting, they are to wash with water so that they will not die. When they approach the altar to present burnt offerings to the Lord,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: they must also wash so that they will not die. This requirement is to be observed by them and their descendants for all generations.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
Take the best quality spices: 500 shekels of liquid myrrh, 250 shekels of sweet-smelling cinnamon, 250 shekels of aromatic reed,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: 500 shekels of cassia (weights using the sanctuary shekel standard), and a hin of olive oil.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Mix these together into holy anointing oil, an aromatic blend like the product of an expert perfumer. Use it as holy anointing oil.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Use it to anoint the Tent of Meeting, the Ark of the Testimony,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: the table and all its equipment, the lampst and and its equipment, the altar of incense,
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: the altar of burnt offering and all its utensils, and the basin plus its st and.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Dedicate them so that they will be especially holy. Whatever touches them will become holy.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Anoint Aaron and his sons too and dedicate them to serve as priests for me.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Tell the Israelites, ‘This is to be my holy anointing oil for all generations to come.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Don't use it on ordinary people and don't make anything like it using the same formula. It is holy, and you must treat it as being holy.
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: Anyone who mixes anointing oil like it, or puts it on someone other than a priest,  will be expelled from their people.’
segments.speaker: The LORD

segments.text: The Lord told Moses,
Take equal amounts of these aromatic spices: balsam resin, onycha, galbanum, and pure frankincense.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Add some salt and make pure and holy incense blended like the product of an expert perfumer.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Grind some of it into powder and place it in front of the Ark of the Testimony in the Tent of Meeting, where I will meet with you. It shall be especially holy to you.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Don't make for yourselves any incense like it using the same formula. You are to consider this incense as holy to the Lord.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: Anyone who makes incense like this for themselves to enjoy will be expelled from their people.
segments.speaker: the Lord
